Description: Unique zone identifier; UUID4 assigned after priority resolution. UUID4 is used because post-erase polygons are irregular shapes whose centroids may fall outside the polygon, making coordinate-based IDs unreliable.

Attribute Domain: Tier 1 - 200ft, Tier 2 - 200ft, Tier 1 - Quarter Mile, Tier 2 - Quarter Mile, Tier 1 - Half Mile, Tier 2 - Half Mile
Description: Priority tier and distance band classification. Each polygon is assigned the highest-priority applicable development standard under SB 79 via sequential erase. In priority order (highest to lowest): Tier 1 - 200ft, Tier 2 - 200ft, Tier 1 - Quarter Mile, Tier 2 - Quarter Mile, Tier 1 - Half Mile, Tier 2 - Half Mile.

Non-overlapping TOD zone polygon in EPSG:4326. Half-mile zones have sub-35,000 population jurisdictions and unincorporated areas erased. Floating-point artifacts smaller than 100 m² are removed after each overlay operation.
